meaning: n.(=Canute) 花花公子,纨裤子弟
examples: The most influential proponent of the coastal migration route has been Canadian archaeologist Knut Fladmark.
From birth, Knut was surrounded by tragedy.
The six-week-old Knut weighs 3.9 kilograms (8.6 pounds).
Knut became world-famous after his birth in 2006, as news of his unusual upbringing emerged.
The media frenzy over Knut boosted visitor numbers to 200, 000 in March - double the zoo's normal figure.
